description_long: This is a tall, rectangular filing cabinet with a dark frame and a front face featuring multiple vertically stacked drawers. Each drawer is equipped with a metallic label pull handle, and the front panels of the drawers are a lighter, brass-like color, contrasting with the dark sides and top. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from metal, giving it a sturdy and industrial appearance suitable for heavy-duty storage. The sides and back are solid and unadorned, emphasizing its utilitarian design. The drawers are likely to be deep enough to accommodate files or documents, and the presence of label holders suggests organizational use. This type of cabinet is commonly found in offices, archives, or storage rooms where secure and organized document storage is required.
description: A tall, dark metal filing cabinet with multiple brass-colored drawers, each featuring a label pull handle. Designed for organized document storage in professional environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing all drawers with label pull handles and label holders.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, dark-colored side panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, unadorned back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a solid, dark surface.
